topics: Introduction to ML: Machine Learning vs. Traditional Programming
Machine Learning Paradigms - Supervised, Semi-Supervised, Unsupervised, Reinforcement Learning

Evaluation Measures - Classification - Precision, Recall, Accuracy, F-Measure
Regression - Mean Absolute Error (MAE), Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE), R Squared/Coefficient of Determination
Unsupervised Learning Clustering - Similarity Measures, Hierarchical Clustering - Agglomerative Clustering, Partitional Clustering, K-Means Clustering
Dimensionality Reduction - Principal Component Analysis, Multidimensional Scaling
